## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated and `pytest` passes (`pytest --cov-fail-under=95 tests/`)
- [ ] `mypy ibflex tests` is clean
- [ ] `ruff check ibflex tests` is clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`
- [ ] If a type changed (e.g. `Decimal` → `bool`), called out as a breaking change in CHANGELOG
- [ ] If a new field was added, anonymized real-world XML used in the test
